name: Pomodori Sott'olio (Marinated Sun-Dried Tomato Topping)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the sun-dried tomatoes in a mixture of 3/4 cup warm water and 3/4 cup warm red wine vinegar for 2 to 3 hours. Drain them and set on a kitchen towel. Pat dry.
2. Stir together the basil, red pepper flakes, garlic, and salt.
3. In a 12-ounce jar, alternate layers of tomatoes with the basil mixture. Pour in the olive oil, ensuring it covers the top layer. Eliminate any air bubbles. Screw on the lid and seal well.
4. Marinate for 1 day before using.
NOTE: Do not use overly salty sun-dried tomatoes. Ensure they are dried by the sun and not an oven, and that they are not already preserved in oil. Serve with bread.
